hypothesis: If non-negativity and sum-to-one physics constraints are added to the diffusion loss during training, then the resulting model will generate composite compositions with higher physical-validity (Validityreg) and fabrication-validity (Validityfab) and equal or better fidelity/diversity (Density/Coverage) than CVAE and TabDDPM, because the constraints confine sampling to the physically feasible composition simplex.
